products.name: Alibarbar Toybox 8000 Puffs
products.description: Experience the unique Toybox design by Alibarbar. Featuring 8000 puffs of dense flavor, mesh coil heating, and a rechargeable Type-C battery. Available in single units or bulk boxes of 10.

products.name: Alibarbar Link 12000 Puffs (Smart Display)
products.description: Premium Alibarbar vape featuring a smart display screen showing e-liquid level and battery percentage. Dual-mesh coil, adjustable airflow, and 12,000 premium puffs.

products.name: IGET Bar 3500 Puffs
products.description: Australia's favorite disposable vape. The IGET Bar features a sturdy ergonomic design, pre-filled with 12mL of premium e-liquid and a 1500mAh built-in battery delivering 3500 pure puffs.

products.name: IGET Legend 4000 Puffs
products.description: Elegantly designed with translucent PCTG materials. The IGET Legend features a mesh coil for smooth hits and rich clouds, producing 4000 satisfying puffs.

products.name: IGET Hot L5500 Puffs
products.description: A futuristic aluminum-housed device with advanced heating elements. Delivers 5500 puffs, high throat hit, and consistent flavor intensity from the first puff to the last.

products.name: Marlboro Gold Carton (10 Packs x 20 Cigarettes)
products.description: The world-famous Marlboro Gold. Known for its refined, smooth tobacco blend and exceptional quality. Sold strictly as a carton containing 200 cigarettes.

products.name: Winfield Blue Carton (10 Packs x 25 Cigarettes)
products.description: An absolute Australian classic. Winfield Blue offers the signature rich domestic tobacco blend. Carton contains 10 packs of 25s (250 cigarettes total).

products.name: JPS Blue Carton (10 Packs x 20 Cigarettes)
products.description: John Player Special Blue cartons. Premium fine-cut tobacco, smooth draw and affordable bulk pricing. Contains 200 cigarettes.

products.name: Benson & Hedges Classic Carton (10 Packs x 20 Cigarettes)
products.description: Benson & Hedges Classic Red cartons. Gold-leaf tobacco blend offering a full-flavored, luxurious, and clean smoke. 200 cigarettes per carton.

products.name: HQD Cuvie Bar Box (10x Disposables)
products.description: WHOLESALE ONLY BOX (Cheapest Box Option - No Singles Available). HQD Cuvie Bar disposables featuring 7000 puffs and mesh heating coils. Each box contains 10 units of the selected flavor.
